findings.issue: RCPL channel card now has two click targets: the thumbnail still calls zoomImage() to open the Accenture screenshot, and the title + 'deep dive →' button link to /jcp/rcpl. This is consistent with every other channel-card in the file (the thumbnail-zoom pattern is the channel-gallery convention) so it isn't a regression — but per the audit-framework 'one target per card' rule it's worth noting. Acceptable here because the two targets are genuinely distinct (zoom the visual asset vs navigate to deep-dive content).
findings.fix: No action. If a future revision drops the Accenture-screenshot zoom across the gallery, RCPL comes along with it.

findings.issue: Sibling JCP pages (/jcp/, /jcp/channels/, /jcp/cataloging/, /jcp/7eleven/, /jcp/release-notes/) still carry the deprecated 'Owner · Salman Saudagar (COO, Fynd) · v0.8.4' footer line. RCPL page is now the only one with the clean single-line footer. Per spec D4, this is the documented register-wide-sweep deferral and the inconsistency is by design until tools/scratch/strip_author_owner.py runs across the whole site.
findings.fix: Defer to register-wide sweep. Spec D4 already documents this. Track separately.

strengths: All 8 findings from the prior audit (C1, H1, M1, M2, L1-L4) are verifiably closed with evidence — no partial fixes, no fake-fixes.

Lightbox implementation is correct: `display:none` ↔ `display:flex` toggle from JS only (no `hidden` attribute conflict), modified-click new-tab fallback preserved, ESC + overlay-click + close-button all work, body scroll locked while open.

All 5 new product UI screenshots are legible, sourced from `pdfimages -j` extraction (not whole-page PDF renders), wrapped in `js-lightbox` anchors per `website-section-authoring` §6 — no bullet-text bleed.

Cross-page reconciliation handled the harder direction: home-page numbers now mirror the deep-dive (₹20,000 Cr FY26 run-rate, 5 PODs, 1.86 L assets), and four entry points (lines 228, 236, 346 in `index.html`; line 123 in `jcp/index.html`; the channel card in `jcp/channels/index.html`) all route into /jcp/rcpl.
Mobile viewport renders with no horizontal overflow at 375px; full-page screenshot shows clean 8-section layout with images embedded and lightbox-ready.
